sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4230" key="a(linhxh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλῐ-νηχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0188.tlg001:10:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.9</biblScope> </bibl>; <sense id="n4230.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of swimmers</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0188.tlg001:6:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.29</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jul.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
